---
title: "Infrastructure is not enough: Interactions between the environment, socioeconomic disadvantage and cycling participation in England"
description: "Eugeni Vidal Tortosa, R. Lovelace, E. Heinen, and R. P. Mann (2021). Infrastructure is not enough: Interactions between the environment, socioeconomic disadvantage and cycling participation in England. *Journal of Transport and Land Use*. https://doi.org/10.5198/jtlu.2021.1781"
date: "2021-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "vidaltortosa_infrastructure_2021"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Transport and Land Use"
doi: "10.5198/jtlu.2021.1781"
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Eugeni Vidal Tortosa"
  - "R. Lovelace"
  - "E. Heinen"
  - "R. P. Mann"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Transport and Land Use
**Year:** 2021

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.5198/jtlu.2021.1781) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Eugeni Vidal Tortosa, R. Lovelace, E. Heinen, and R. P. Mann (2021). Infrastructure is not enough: Interactions between the environment, socioeconomic disadvantage and cycling participation in England. *Journal of Transport and Land Use*. https://doi.org/10.5198/jtlu.2021.1781

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{vidaltortosa_infrastructure_2021,
  ids = {tortosa_infrastructure_2021},
  title = {Infrastructure Is Not Enough: Interactions between the Environment, Socioeconomic Disadvantage and Cycling Participation in {{England}}},
  shorttitle = {Infrastructure Is Not Enough},
  author = {Vidal Tortosa, Eugeni and Lovelace, R. and Heinen, E. and Mann, R. P.},
  year = {2021},
  journal = {Journal of Transport and Land Use},
  number = {1},
  publisher = {{University of Minnesota}},
  issn = {1938-7849},
  doi = {10.5198/jtlu.2021.1781},
  urldate = {2021-03-06},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  langid = {english},
  keywords = {physical activity},
  file = {/home/robin/hd/od/career/phds/eugeni/paper1/resubmission1/Paper-1_final_version_120221-rl.docx;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/2V6CC82P/Tortosa et al. - 2021 - Infrastructure is not enough Interactions between.pdf;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/FGQGYYBX/Tortosa et al. - 2021 - Infrastructure is not enough Interactions between.pdf;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/5XGYGBCG/170217.html;/home/robin/Zotero/storage/JDAFHYHP/1781.html}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
